```{r library}

# Install from source
install.packages("G:/My Drive/r_project/cindexdecomp", 
                 repos = NULL, 
                 type  = "source")


```

```{r test}
library(dplyr)
library(survival)
library(cindexdecomp)

# Remove NAs first
lung_clean <- lung %>% 
  filter(!is.na(time), !is.na(status), !is.na(age), 
         !is.na(sex), !is.na(ph.ecog))

fit  <- coxph(Surv(time, status - 1) ~ age + sex + ph.ecog, 
              data = lung_clean)
risk <- predict(fit, type = "lp")

# Test decompose
result <- decompose_cindex(
  time   = lung_clean$time,
  status = lung_clean$status - 1,  # convert 1/2 to 0/1
  risk   = risk
)
print(result)

# Test simulate
sim <- simulate_censoring(
  time      = lung_clean$time,
  status    = lung_clean$status - 1,
  risk      = risk,
  n_thresholds = 50,
  min_pairs = 500
)
print(head(sim))

# Test plots
plot_simulation(sim)

```
